message:
beads: flush issues.jsonl (third routine flush this session)

Net 4-line churn on .beads/issues.jsonl from ongoing agent activity.
Per prior convention in this session, leaving .ntm/logs/* and
.claude/scheduled_tasks.lock uncommitted — those are ephemeral
runtime state that belongs to whichever supervisor/daemon produced
them, not to the beads record.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
